model.name: DREAM S2 news-cycle retention
model.lambda_interpretation: lambda = elapsed hours since topic attention peak
model.signal_preprocessing: Formal S2 fit uses circadian-corrected publish-time article counts: raw count divided by expected global publishing/activity factor.
model.observation_clock: article.published_at, not GitHub Action run time
model.history_role: data/history.json retains raw article records and first_seen/last_seen provenance; publication time reconstructs the curve.
model.comparison: Delta AIC = AIC(exponential beta=1) - AIC(stretched S2 beta free)
model.cycle_archive_role: data/cycles.json stores completed formal cycle summaries so prior S2 learning remains visible when a new wave resets the current topic.

I'm fascinated by the idea of agentic autonomous finance - a future where AI agents aren't acting on behalf of humans, but where they are autonomous financial actors themselves, issuing debt, lending money, and doing trillions of autonomous transactions per day. articles.title: Biodiversity fears as human-bred hybrid fish integrate into Philippines lake
articles.summary: Escaped flowerhorn cichlids are causing concern for native species and about parasites capable of infecting humans Escaped ornamental aquarium fish have integrated into a local ecosystem in the Philippines, but scientists say they may be threatening the native biodiversity of the lake. Flowerhorn cichlids – human-bred hybrid fish prized for their bright-gold colour and prominent head humps – are believed to have escaped from breeding facilities into Lake Sampaloc, which sits in a volcanic crater
